g.text: Synthetic data — style demo only (not real results). set.seed(1/3/4); n=80 samples; 3 subtypes (Basal/LumA/LumB). PCA separation does not imply causation; KM differences require confounder adjustment; enrichment p-values are FDR-corrected.
